---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

A clear, one-line summary of the feature.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What biological or computational problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like, including any API design ideas.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've considered and why they were not chosen.

## Additional Context

Links to papers, related tools, example datasets, or screenshots.
